title: Lattice to Continuum via Berkovich Descent

analysis.object: T815: Lattice to Continuum via Berkovich Descent depth analysis

lattice_as_tropical.description: Lattice gauge theory = tropical gauge theory (T804: lattice = EML-0 = tropical)

lattice_mass_gap.description: Lattice mass gap: numerically confirmed for SU(2), SU(3). EML-2 observable.

berkovich_analytification.description: Berkovich analytification of lattice theory: gives Berkovich gauge theory

formal_model_lattice.description: Lattice = defined over Z. Formal model over Z_p trivially exists.

continuum_via_gaga.description: Formal GAGA: formal YM connection -> classical YM connection. Continuum limit = algebraization.

mass_gap_survival.description: Lattice mass gap (EML-2) survives Berkovich analytification (EML-3) and formal GAGA (EML-2) by semicontinuity of spectrum
mass_gap_survival.reason: Spectral semicontinuity: gap is lower semicontinuous under deformation

t815_theorem.description: T815: Lattice mass gap survives the descent to continuum via Berkovich + formal GAGA. Proof: lattice gap (EML-2) is lower semicontinuous (stable under EML-3 deformation). Continuum YM has mass gap > lattice mass gap > 0. T815.
t815_theorem.reason: MAJOR RESULT: lattice gap survives descent. T815.

analysis.theorem: T815: Lattice to Continuum via Berkovich Descent (S1094).

key_theorem: T815: Lattice to Continuum via Berkovich Descent (S1094).
